                                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ca_address_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=2113665
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2113665

                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2113665
